description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow enclosed by a low perimeter wall, featuring a minimalist design with clean lines and geometric forms. The front facade includes a gated entrance, a small porch area, and a pair of trees providing natural shade. Large windows and sliding glass doors dominate the rear and side elevations, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray concrete or stucco, with some sections accented by darker panels and a small patch of green rooftop garden. The property includes a paved courtyard and driveway, with visible fencing and landscaping elements. The overall structure is compact yet spacious, with a focus on open-plan living and outdoor integration.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, minimalist lines, and a walled courtyard. Features include a gated entrance, trees, and a rooftop garden patch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, porch, two trees, and the main access to the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, uninterrupted wall, small rooftop garden, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with expansive windows, sliding doors, and a paved courtyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wall enclosure, partial view of the trees, and the flat roof layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
